name: HIV - Antiretroviral Therapy (ART) Combination Query
description: Tests ability to find HIV patients via antiretroviral therapy (ART) prescriptions. Modern HIV management uses single-tablet combination regimens (Triumeq, Genvoya, Odefsey, Stribild, Complera) for daily lifelong suppressive therapy. Unlike HCV's DAAs (curative, finite course), HIV ART is suppressive and continuous. Synthea distributes patients across 5 modern combination tablets. ARTs are highly specific to HIV (and PrEP) — like MS DMTs, Path C should be small.
prompt: Find patients prescribed antiretroviral therapy combination tablets used to treat HIV, including Triumeq, Genvoya, Odefsey, Stribild, or Complera.

prompts.broad: Find patients prescribed any antiretroviral therapy (ART) combination tablet for HIV — Triumeq (abacavir/dolutegravir/lamivudine), Genvoya (cobicistat/elvitegravir/emtricitabine/tenofovir alafenamide), Odefsey (emtricitabine/rilpivirine/tenofovir alafenamide), Stribild (cobicistat/elvitegravir/emtricitabine/tenofovir disoproxil), or Complera (emtricitabine/rilpivirine/tenofovir disoproxil).
prompts.expert: I need MedicationRequest resources for any HIV ART combination tablet. Use these RxNorm SCD codes from CSTE 'HIV Infection (ARV Combination Treatment) (RXNORM)' VSAC (OID 2.16.840.1.113762.1.4.1146.1597): 1147334 (Complera), 1306292 (Stribild), 1546888 (Triumeq), 1721613 (Genvoya), 1741733 (Odefsey). Combine in a single comma-separated code search. ARTs are highly specific to HIV — Path C (ART without HIV dx) is small (mostly PrEP).

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with ART orders (Paths A and C). Path C is small because ARTs are HIV-specific. Some patients on emtricitabine/tenofovir combinations may be on PrEP rather than treatment.

required_codes.display: emtricitabine 200 MG / rilpivirine 25 MG / tenofovir disoproxil fumarate 300 MG Oral Tablet (Complera)
cobicistat 150 MG / elvitegravir 150 MG / emtricitabine 200 MG / tenofovir disoproxil fumarate 300 MG Oral Tablet (Stribild)
abacavir 600 MG / dolutegravir 50 MG / lamivudine 300 MG Oral Tablet (Triumeq)
cobicistat 150 MG / elvitegravir 150 MG / emtricitabine 200 MG / tenofovir alafenamide 10 MG Oral Tablet (Genvoya)
emtricitabine 200 MG / rilpivirine 25 MG / tenofovir alafenamide 25 MG Oral Tablet (Odefsey)
